research_paper_generator.description: Main research paper generator that orchestrates all sections through nested prompts and tag-based injection

abstract_template.description: Reusable abstract template used by research_paper_generator. Contains variable placeholders for subject, focus, and key findings.

research_instructions.description: Guidelines for conducting research in the specified domain. Covers structure, methodology, and quality standards.

methodology_template.description: Detailed methodology section template covering research design, participants, data collection, and analysis methods.

validation_checklist.description: Validation checklist for research methodology. Ensures all quality and validation criteria are met before submission.

reference_guidelines.description: Guidelines for formatting references and citations. Includes citation style requirements and authority level standards.

example_ai_research.description: Real-world case study of AI integration in computer science research. Demonstrates 50% time reduction and improved hypothesis quality.

example_biomedical_study.description: Case study of AI-enhanced drug discovery. Shows AI acceleration in protein prediction and drug candidate screening.

example_social_science.description: Case study of NLP in social science research. Demonstrates how AI analyzed 50,000 survey responses in 3 weeks.

foundational_machine_learning.description: Foundational concepts in supervised machine learning. Covers key principles, algorithms, and research applications.

foundational_statistics.description: Foundational statistical hypothesis testing concepts. Covers p-values, significance levels, common tests, and research importance.

foundational_research_ethics.description: Research ethics and IRB requirements. Covers core principles, IRB procedures, and special considerations for different research types.

example_citation_ml.description: Example citations in machine learning field. Shows proper APA 7th edition formatting with DOI links.

example_citation_statistics.description: Example citations in statistics field. Covers foundational statistical texts and guidelines for usage.
